title: codereview-P2: rate limit values arbitrary; align with existing patterns from SOS and store-and-forward
description: Dead drop rate limits (6/hour, 8KB etc) should be justified or matched to similar features. SOS uses 3/hour. Storage limits should reference platform budgets from 18.1.4. Add rationale column or link to memory section.
close_reason: Fixed: updated rate limits to use Value/Rationale columns, aligned numbers and added links to 18.1.4
